title: quercus × harbisonii
intro: Quercus × harbisonii, also known as the hybrid white oak, is a rare and unique plant that combines the characteristics of its parent species, Quercus robur and Quercus alba. Its bark, leaves, and acorns have been used in herbal medicine for centuries, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Quercus × harbisonii include reducing cardiovascular disease risk, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
